title: MACP Acknowledgement
description: Validates an Ack message in JSON form. See RFC-MACP-0001 Section 8.

ok.description: True if the envelope was accepted into session history.

duplicate.description: True if the message_id was already seen (idempotent accept).

message_id.description: The message_id of the acknowledged envelope.

session_id.description: Session identifier the acknowledged message belongs to.

accepted_at_unix_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the message was accepted.

session_state.description: Session lifecycle state after accepting the message.

code.description: Machine-readable error code from the error code registry.

session_id.description: Session identifier related to the error.

message_id.description: Message identifier that triggered the error.

details.description: Additional structured error details (protobuf bytes as base64).

Base64Bytes.description: Protobuf bytes mapped to base64 string in JSON.
